name: 3 Drawer Storage Cabinet Gray - Brightroom™: Plastic Utility Storage Drawers, Universal Organization, No Assembly Required
description: Enhance the look of storage space while staying organized, neat and tidy! Add a decorative and contemporary aesthetic to any visible space with the 3 Drawer Tower – and the legs provide an extra modern touch. Perfect for any room in the home, as well as workspaces, offices and dorms. Store anything from clothing, linens and towels to school, office and craft supplies, toys and more. Three opaque drawers keep clutter controlled and concealed while providing access to frequently used items, where they are most often used. Hidden rollers and wide ergonomic handles allow drawers to open and close easily, even under heavy loads. Drawer stops are used to prevent drawers from being removed accidentally. Made of durable plastic, wipe clean with ease using a damp cloth. The overall assembled dimensions of this item are 19" L x 20" W x 32" H.
